summary: 345 test specifications defined across 8 layers (revised from 309). 256 feature/API/entity/UI tests (219 P1, 34 P2, 3 P3), 43 integration scenarios (37 P1, 6 P2), 46 runtime safety specs (44 P1, 2 P2). 10 AI-specific safety tests. Revision added 36 specifications covering language detection, board references, input validation, monitoring service, manual merge, recursive merge integrity, context re-indexing safety, and Celery worker stability.

critical_risks: AI function calling infinite loops (Facilitator max 3 rounds, Board Agent max 10 rounds)
AI fabrication in BRD generation (Summarizing AI highest risk agent)
Cross-idea context isolation (AI must never leak data between ideas)
Idea state machine integrity (5 states, 8 valid transitions, many invalid paths)
Merge operation atomicity (creates new idea, closes originals, transfers ownership)
Recursive merge 2-owner enforcement (co-owner demotion on re-merge)
WebSocket connection lifecycle (leaks, reconnection, idle timeout)
Rate limit counter accuracy under concurrent access
AI processing abort-and-restart on new message (no partial state)
Context re-indexing atomicity (old chunks preserved until new chunks succeed)
Soft delete cleanup partial failure resilience (per-idea error isolation)

revision_notes.reason: Improvement assessment identified 36 missing test specifications across all documents

changes.test_matrix: +26 tests (F-2.2 language detection, F-3.8 board reference action, F-4.12 similar ideas in review, F-5.8 manual merge, F-6.6 connection indicator, F-11.5 monitoring service, F-13.3 role-based notification groups, input validation edge cases)
changes.integration_scenarios: +5 scenarios (read-only link access, admin context re-indexing, collaborator removal chain, manual merge recovery, recursive merge)
changes.runtime_safety: +5 specs (LOOP-008 soft delete cleanup, TIMEOUT-007 context re-indexing, LEAK-007 Celery memory, INTEGRITY-009 recursive merge, INTEGRITY-010 monitoring alert singleton)
changes.test_fixtures: +1 factory (MonitoringAlertConfigFactory), +1 composite scenario (CollaborationFlow), fixed resubmission version links
changes.test_plan: Added visual regression strategy, WebSocket coverage depth note

next_commands.command: /strategy_planner Read handover at docs/04-test-architecture/handover.json. All specs and test architecture ready for milestone planning.
next_commands.description: Start milestone planning and wave strategy
